DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT RICHARD GREENBERG'S MOTION TO COMPEL GENE HABEL TO SIGN AN AUTHORIZATION TO OBTAIN CONFIDENTIAL RECORDS AND FOR SANCTIONS FOR THE UNREASONABLE FAILURE TO APPEAR AT PROPERLY NOTICED DEPOSITION. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED IN PART. PLAINTIFF MUST SIGN ON AUTHORIZATION PERMITTING SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL TO RELEASE ALL RECORDS PERTAINING TO THE HOSPITALIZATION ON MAY 30, 2007. RECORDS SHALL BE MARKED CONFIDENTIAL AND ORDERED TO BE USED ONLY FOR THE PURPOSES OF THIS LITIGATION. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. FAILURE TO IDENTIFY PERSON TO BE SANCTIONED. (CCP 2033.040). PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; NOT REPORTED.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-02-2012 Off Calendar

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-06-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-08-12 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Tim Gomes, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Gene Habel.
Joseph Devine, Esq. for the Defendant: Richard Greenberg dba
The Court stated for the record, without parties present, settlement record can be made but may not be enforceable. Counsel stated that they understood.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Settlement amount of $7,500.00 to be paid into to Mr. Gomes's client-trust account, defendant will waived the collection on $1,500.00 discovery sanctions, dismissal to be filed and each side to bear own costs and fees.
Parties agreed to terms on the record, matter was deemed settled by the court, and was set on the CRC dismissal calendar for 05-08-13 at 10 a.m. in Dept. 610.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Attendance At Independent Medical Examination; Request For Sanctions Against Tim Gomes In The Amount Of $2310.00
Off Calendar Sep-06-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT RICHARD GREENBERG DBA GREENBERG'S MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT INDEPENDENT MEDICAL EXAMINATION; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS AGAINST ATTORNEY TIM GOMES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,310.00.

APPEARANCES: Tim Gomes, Esq. of Law Offices of Tim Gomes 626-8100 for pltf & opposing party; Joseph M. Devine, Esq. of Kern, Noda, Devine & Segal 474-1900 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Plaintiff filed a late opposition. Argued and the Court granted the motion to compel. Appointment to be set up and defendant's counsel to contact plaintiff's counsel the night before to confirm doctor's availability.
As to sanctions, argued and the Court took the matter under submission.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows on the sanctions: Plaintiff's counsel to pay defendant's counsel $1,500.00 within 15 days of notice of entry of order. Defendant to prepare a proposed form of order. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

Mtn To Compel Gene Habel To Sign An Authorization To Obtain Confidential Records And For Sanctions For The Unreasonable Failure To Appear At Properly Noticed Deposition
Off Calendar Dec-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RICHARD GREENBERG'S MOTION TO COMPEL GENE HABEL TO SIGN AN AUTHORIZATION TO OBTAIN CONFIDENTIAL RECORDS AND FOR SANCTIONS FOR THE UNREASONABLE FAILURE TO APPEAR AT PROPERLY NOTICED DEPOSITION. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted in part. Plaintiff must sign on authorization permitting San Francisco General Hospital to release all records pertaining to the hospitalization on May 30, 2007. Records shall be marked confidential and ordered to be used only for the purposes of this litigation. Request for sanctions denied without prejudice. Failure to identify person to be sanctioned. (CCP 2033.040). Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 23, 2010. OPPOSING PARTY TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPY PER SF LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported
